action_set_definitions.name: fetch_application_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a specific insurance application, including status, applicant profile, base premium, and audit logs.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the policy (e.g., 'POL-882-MFG').

action_set_definitions.name: get_document_content
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the text content of a specific report or document associated with an application.

document_id.description: The name or ID of the document (e.g., 'LCR-2024').

example_output.content: Risk assessment details: Fire safety systems are upgraded (+5% credit)...

action_set_definitions.name: submit_irpm_evaluation
action_set_definitions.description: Records the Individual Risk Premium Modification (IRPM) details, including specific credits/debits and their justifications based on risk characteristics.

percentage.description: The decimal modification (e.g., -0.05 for 5% credit, 0.03 for 3% debit).

total_schedule_mod.description: The sum of all modification percentages.

action_set_definitions.name: request_management_escalation
action_set_definitions.description: Requests management approval for modifications exceeding the Agent's 10% authority limit.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_underwriting
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the final standard premium and transitions the policy status.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the insurance application.
state_description.underwriting_status: Current status of the review (e.g., PENDING_INFO, UNDER_REVIEW, COMPLETED).
state_description.applicant_profile: Aggregated data about the applicant including age, occupation, and basic health metrics.
state_description.risk_flags: List of identified risk indicators or medical red flags.
state_description.satisfied_requirements: List of documents or verifications successfully received and processed.
state_description.pending_requirements: List of outstanding documents or data points required to finalize the decision.
state_description.internal_audit_log: Internal chronological record of actions taken within the environment for consistency tracking.

internal_audit_log: 2024-11-02: Experience Mod 1.10 applied based on 3-year loss run data.
2024-11-03: Loss Control Report (LCR-2024) received and attached to file.
